description: CompositionGrey cap made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, with eyelets on the panels, branded tape on the inside on the seam lines, adjustable plastic clasp closure at the back, puma badge printed on the front with embroidered detailing, Scudera ferrari badge on the back and stripe print on the visorCareGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not dry cleanWash with similar coloursUse detergent for coloursDo not wringStretch to original shape while dampGet ready to bring out the racing demon in you with this cap from puma. The eyelets keep you cool while the sleek styling with a Ferrari seal and badge at the back makes this one coveted cap. Team it with your Sports clothes or casuals when you go out in the sun and carry the Ferrari spirit wherever you go.
